news.t: Virtus Introduces Virtus AlphaSimplex Global Macro ETF

overview.description: The Virtus AlphaSimplex Global Macro ETF (ASGM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in global macro alternatives. The fund blends equity exposure and global macro strategies. The actively managed fund invests in equity ETFs while employing long/short exposures across investment styles and asset classes, including stocks, bonds, currencies, and commodities ASGM was launched on Aug 4, 2025 and is issued by Virtus Investment Partners.

data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Virtus Investment Partners, Inc. (NYSE: VRTS) has expanded its offerings of distinctive, actively managed exchange-traded funds with the introduction of the Virtus AlphaSimp...
